title: Justice Yashwant Varma’s resignation before impeachment third in Indian history
description: Allahabad High Court Justice Yashwant Varma’s resignation from the post is only the third instance of a sitting judge resigning from the post in the face of impending impeachment.While impeachment is designed as the highest mechanism of judicial accountability, it has rarely run its full course.The furthest such proceedings progressed was in the case of Justice Soumitra Sen of the Calcutta High Court.Accused of misappropriation of funds, Justice Sen had faced an inquiry committee that found him
